cases.passage: The annual Inter-School Athletic Meet is being organized at a local stadium. The event is expected to attract over 5000 spectators, including students, teachers, and parents. The organizers have planned to sell tickets online and offline to ensure a smooth entry process. However, they are concerned about the crowd management during the event. The stadium has a seating capacity of 3000, and the organizers want to ensure that there is adequate space for spectators to move around comfortably. They have also planned to set up a medical aid center and a lost and found desk to cater to the needs of the spectators. The organizers are planning to hire security personnel to maintain law and order during the event.

questions.q: Why is crowd management important during the Inter-School Athletic Meet?
opts: (A) To ensure a smooth entry process
(B) To maintain law and order during the event
(C) To cater to the needs of the spectators
(D) None of the above
questions.explanation: Crowd management is important during the Inter-School Athletic Meet to maintain law and order during the event.

questions.q: What is the seating capacity of the stadium?
questions.explanation: The seating capacity of the stadium is 3000.

questions.q: Why have the organizers planned to set up a medical aid center?
opts: (A) To cater to the needs of the spectators
(B) To sell tickets online and offline
(C) To maintain law and order during the event
(D) None of the above
questions.explanation: The organizers have planned to set up a medical aid center to cater to the needs of the spectators.

questions.q: What is the expected number of spectators at the Inter-School Athletic Meet?
questions.explanation: The event is expected to attract over 5000 spectators.

questions.q: Why have the organizers planned to hire security personnel?
opts: (A) To ensure a smooth entry process
(B) To cater to the needs of the spectators
(C) To maintain law and order during the event
(D) None of the above
questions.explanation: The organizers are planning to hire security personnel to maintain law and order during the event.

cases.passage: The state-level Sports Festival is being organized at a large stadium. The festival is expected to attract over 20,000 spectators, including athletes, coaches, and spectators. The organizers have planned to set up a large number of food stalls and drinking water facilities to cater to the needs of the spectators. However, they are concerned about the sanitation and hygiene of the stadium during the event. The organizers have planned to hire a large number of sanitation workers to ensure that the stadium is clean and hygienic throughout the event. They have also planned to set up a lost and found desk to cater to the needs of the spectators.

(D) None of the above
